tasks.description: Task management: queries, mutations, actions, and HTTP handlers for tasks with status, assignees, due dates, and comments.

getTask.description: Fetch a single task by ID.

listTasks.description: List tasks with optional status filter and limit.

listTasksByStatus.description: List all tasks with the given status (todo, in_progress, done).

listTasksByAssignee.description: List all tasks assigned to a user.

getTasksDueBefore.description: List tasks with a due date before the given timestamp.

listDoneTasks.description: List all tasks marked as done.

getTaskWithComments.description: Fetch a task and its comments.

getTasksInList.description: List all tasks in a given list.

createTask.description: Create a new task with optional title, description, status, assignee, due date, priority, and list.

updateTask.description: Update a task's fields (title, description, done, status, assignee, due date, priority).

setStatus.description: Set a task's status (todo, in_progress, done).

assignTask.description: Assign a task to a user.

addComment.description: Add a comment to a task.

runTask.description: Run a task with optional delay (default 100ms).

notifyTaskAssigned.description: Simulate sending a notification when a task is assigned.

syncTasksFromExternal.description: Simulate syncing tasks from an external URL.

processTaskBatch.description: Process a batch of task IDs (simulated).

handleTaskRequest.description: HTTP handler for GET /task (returns a greeting).

handleTaskOptions.description: CORS preflight handler for the task endpoint.

helperInternalQuery.description: Internal query helper (for testing doc exclusion).

helperInternalMutation.description: Internal mutation helper (for testing doc exclusion).

helperInternalAction.description: Internal action helper (for testing doc exclusion).

lists.description: Task list management: create, rename, delete, and query lists.

listLists.description: List all lists, ordered by creation.

getList.description: Fetch a single list by ID.

getListByName.description: Find a list by exact name.

createList.description: Create a new list with a name.

http.description: HTTP router for task-related endpoints (e.g. GET /task, OPTIONS).
